---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in any project
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Project / Component

Which project and component is affected? (e.g., `Scripts.DupDetector / scanner`)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Select / input `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What should happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happens. Include error messages and stack traces if available.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11 24H2 / Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 15)
- **Python:** (e.g., 3.12.3) — run `python --version`
- **Project version:** (e.g., 2.1.0) — run `<project> --version`
- **Installation method:** system pip / pip --user / venv
- **Admin / sudo:** Yes / No

## Log Output

<details>
<summary>Relevant log excerpt</summary>

```
Paste relevant log lines here
```

</details>

## Additional Context

Any other info (screenshots, config files, related issues).
